# services.locate

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.locate`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.locate.enable` | `boolean` | If enabled, NixOS will periodically update the database of files used by the {command}`locate` command. |
| `services.locate.extraFlags` | `list of string` | Extra flags to pass to {command}`updatedb`. |
| `services.locate.interval` | `string` | Update the locate database at this interval. Updates by default at 2:15 AM every day. The format is described in {manpage}`systemd.time(7)`. To disable automatic updates, set to `"never"` and run {command}`updatedb` manually. |
| `services.locate.output` | `absolute path` | The database file to build. |
| `services.locate.package` | `package` | The plocate package to use. |
| `services.locate.pruneBindMounts` | `boolean` | Whether not to index bind mounts |
| `services.locate.pruneFS` | `list of string` | Which filesystem types to exclude from indexing |
| `services.locate.pruneNames` | `list of string` | Directory components which should exclude paths containing them from indexing |
| `services.locate.prunePaths` | `list of absolute path` | Which paths to exclude from indexing |
